raw_consumer_statement:
I had a XXXX subscription and received dog food on XX/XX/XXXX and trying to return the food and unable to return it and disputed the transaction with Citi Bank. 
The reason I wanted to return the product was that my pet stopped eating the dog food sent by XXXX. As per the attached return policy XXXX is allowed to return the food if the dog doesn't eat the food. Yes, the box is not open and already contacted XXXX and Citi bank is not helping to get the refund. I got this extremely misleading email from Citi bank claiming " Citi is at your side before, during and after every purchase. 
Your Citi Team '' and it was the opposite, and Citi was never on my side throughout this investigation and sending false information via email to mislead the customers
